title: cyclobalanus bennettii
intro: Cyclobalanus bennettii, also known as the Chinese sweetgum tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cyclobalanus bennettii include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Cyclobalanus bennettii can be prepared into various herbal forms, including tea, decoctions, and infusions, which are often combined with other herbs to enhance their therapeutic effects.
